meta.title: Ski & Snowboard Lessons in Chile | CDSKI — Valle Nevado, El Colorado, La Parva
meta.description: Ski and snowboard lessons for all levels at Valle Nevado, El Colorado, and La Parva. Certified instructors, all-inclusive packages, and guided snow experiences in the Chilean Andes.
meta.keywords: ski lessons Chile, snowboard classes Santiago, Valle Nevado lessons, El Colorado ski, La Parva snowboard, ski school Chile, ski instructor, learn to ski Chile

reviews.name: María García
reviews.text: We had a wonderful day with Juan Pablo. I would recommend him, he is charming and very patient. Really a great teacher and a great person.

reviews.name: Carlos Oliveira
reviews.text: We had an amazing day with Juan Pablo! Great ski instructor, very kind and attentive. Thank you so much!

reviews.name: Patricia Mendez
reviews.text: Great instructors! We took lessons for two adults and two 5-year-old girls, JP is a great instructor with care and patience!

reviews.name: James Wilson
reviews.text: Amazing experience! The instructors really know these mountains. Best ski lesson I've ever had. Valle Nevado is stunning!

reviews.name: Sophie Müller
reviews.text: Perfect ski lessons! The instructors are very patient and professional. We will definitely come back next year!

reviews.name: Yuki Tanaka
reviews.text: It was a wonderful ski experience. The instructor was very kind, and the Chilean mountains were beautiful.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before your snow adventure

questions.q: Do I need prior experience to take lessons?
questions.a: Not at all! We have lessons for all levels, from absolute beginners to advanced. Our instructors adapt their teaching to your level.

questions.q: What do the all-inclusive packages include?
questions.a: All-inclusive packages include ski resort access ticket, complete equipment (ski or snowboard, boots, and poles), and a 2-hour lesson with a certified instructor.

questions.q: Which ski resorts do you operate at?
questions.a: We operate at Santiago's three main ski resorts: Valle Nevado (the largest in South America), El Colorado, and La Parva, all less than 50 km from Santiago.

questions.q: When is the ski season in Chile?
questions.a: The ski season in Chile runs from June to October. Peak season includes weekends, holidays, and winter vacation (usually the last week of June and the first week of July).

questions.q: Do you offer lessons in English and Portuguese?
questions.a: Yes! Our instructors speak Spanish, English, and Portuguese. We specialize in welcoming international tourists from the Americas, Europe, and Asia.
We accept Webpay Plus (Chilean and international debit/credit cards), Mercado Pago, PayPal, and bank transfer. Payment is 100% secure with instant confirmation.

questions.q: What age can children start taking lessons?
questions.a: Children can start skiing from age 5. We have instructors specialized in children's teaching with fun and safe methodology.

questions.q: What should I bring to my ski lesson?
questions.a: We recommend thermal layered clothing, waterproof gloves, hat, sunscreen, and sunglasses or goggles. Ski/snowboard equipment is included in our packages.
